body_transformation: The compact stone body now gleams with a polished electric blue ceramic finish, its surface etched with vibrant yellow circuit patterns that pulse with energy. Jagged lightning-bolt spines emerge along the spine, sharp and angular, while the rounded knuckles of the fist-like arms sprout neon green sparking tips. The gray stone texture is replaced by a smooth, conductive metallic sheen, with glowing circuit lines tracing the joints and limbs. Tiny neon sparks flicker at the tips of the short legs, enhancing the wiry, lean frame.
signature_feature: Spine spines: jagged lightning-bolt shaped ceramic spines with glowing yellow circuit patterns and neon green sparks.
